task_description: Implement Step Functions state machine skeleton with Polly integration task state, wire EventBridge rule to target the state machine, and update architecture documentation. Follows strict TDD approach.

verification.summary: All 14 tests pass (7 existing + 7 new) with 100% code coverage. cdk synth succeeds. New tests verify state machine exists, Polly task in definition, logging configured, EventBridge targets state machine, IAM has polly:startSpeechSynthesisTask, input transformation uses $.detail, and negative test confirms log group is not an EventBridge target. Tests exercise real CDK constructs and would fail if any resource or property were removed.
